textPlain: So, I'm recently on the market looking for work, and I know everyone wants to creep your GH. I also really needed to practice talking and answering things. So, I broke out Goose, Ollama, and Plan mode, and came up with a free, pointless app to record, and then listen to yourself.If it helps, use it.
bad timing with the cloud flare thing - we'll all have to take a look later onit sounds neat though - what kind of practice have you tried? language learning?
